Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
feat: Major enhancements to No Fridge Spoil app - 1/21/2026

- Added new components: CookMode, EatThisTonightWidget, ReviewItems, VoiceAssistant
- Created new pages: Alerts and ShoppingList
- Enhanced scanning functionality with queue service and image compression
- Added new services: barcode cache, fact checking, impact tracking, receipt OCR, shelf life, substitutions, and voice
- Improved UI across Inventory, Recipes, Scan, and Stats pages
- Updated PWA assets and manifest
- Added utility functions for debouncing and UUID generation
- Enhanced database schema and context management

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")
